download.a: 📥 How to Download: 1. Search movie name 2. Select from results 3. Bot forwards the file 4. Click on file to download ❗ Note: Private channel files are copied, public are forwarded.

request.a: 📝 Movie Request: • /request MovieName • OR type 'pls add MovieName' • Max 3/day • Check /myrequests for status

channel.a: 📢 Our Channels: 🍿 Main: @EntertainmentTadka786 🎭 Serial: @Entertainment_Tadka_Serial_786 🎬 Theater: @threater_print_movies 🔒 Backup: @ETBackup 📥 Requests: @EntertainmentTadka7860

language.a: 🌐 Language Support: • Hindi • English • Hinglish Use /language to change your preferred language.

notfound.a: 😔 Movie not found? • Try different spelling • Use /request to request it • Check channels manually • Wait 24 hours for request approval

quality.a: 🎬 Qualities Available: • 1080p (Full HD) • 720p (HD) • 480p (SD) • 4K (Ultra HD) Search with quality: 'Movie Name 1080p'

help.a: 🤖 Bot Commands: /start - Welcome /help - This help /request - Request movie /myrequests - Your requests /stats - Bot stats /totalupload - Browse all /language - Change language /subscribe - Get notifications

subscribe.a: 🔔 Notifications: • /subscribe - Get alerts • /unsubscribe - Stop alerts You'll get notified about: • New movies • Request updates • Announcements

vip.a: 👑 VIP System: VIP users get: • Double request limit • Priority support • Early access Contact admin for VIP status.

stats.a: 📊 Bot Statistics: Use /stats to see: • Total movies • Total users • Total searches • Pending requests
